ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-05-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF JAMES MCWILLIAMS' MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE (PREFERENCE) PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) &(D) IS GRANTED. THE ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE OF 8/18/05 IS VACATED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/20/04; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET 12/10/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. ALL NECESSARY (MEDICAL AND EMPLOYMENT) AUTHORIZATIONS BY 10/8/04. MRS. MCWILLIAMS DEPO BY 10/15/04. PLAINTIFF TO IDENTIFY WITNESSES TESTIFYING ON PRODUCT ID, WITH NAMES AND ADDRESSES BY 10/29/04. COUNSEL STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE SHORTENED TIME ON MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DISCOVERY TO REMAIN OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED OUT FOR TRIAL. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING.
